features.description: Master feature — central identity + Academorix ID issuance. On every tier for consuming tenants.
Enables tenants to file link requests to a PersonIdentity for cross-academy prefill. Medium+.
Enumeration-resistant lookup by AX-ID + DOB. Rate-limited. Medium+.
Cross-tenant guardian↔minor links via central identity. Enterprise — federated athlete academies.
Enterprise. Allow allergies + emergency contact in shareable field subset. Otherwise excluded.
Enterprise. Cross-tenant signed URL to a storage::File on origin tenant.
